name: Cantonese Fish Filling (Dim Sum--See Won Ton Skins)
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 24
1. Heat 1 teaspoon sesame oil in a wok over low heat.
2. Add flounder cubes and garlic; simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from the wok.
3. In the same wok, add the remaining sesame oil and cabbage with scallions. Stir-fry for three minutes.
4. Push the vegetables to one side of the wok. In the center, add mushrooms and lemon juice. Stir-fry for one minute.
5. Return the flounder to the wok. Add pepper and bouillon. Blend everything together.
6. Simmer the mixture for two minutes.
7. Mix cornstarch with water until well blended.
8. Add this mixture to the flounder mixture in the wok. Blend thoroughly.
9. Continue simmering until thickened.
10. Remove the fish filling from the wok and transfer it to a bowl.
11. Assemble wontons and boil.
